forecast-period.text: Clear. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the Barossa Valley. Slight chance of a shower on the eastern slopes in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Light winds.
The chance of fog in the early morning. Sunny day. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending easterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then turning south to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the south, high chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly clear. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Clear. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the morning then tending northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Clear. Light winds.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the day then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. The chance of fog south of Streaky Bay in the early morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending east to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then tending easterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
Clear. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southeasterly in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending northwest to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then turning south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the west coast. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Light winds.

Sunny. The chance of fog south of Woomera in the early morning. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 33.
